{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Impact

The initial vulnerability identified in Streamlit apps using custom components, allowing for directory traversal attacks, was addressed in version 1.11.1. However, a minor issue persisted, which could still potentially expose certain files on the server file-system under specific conditions.

### Patches

We released an update in version 1.30.0 to further tighten security measures. Users are strongly advised to update to version 1.30.0 immediately for optimal security.

### Workarounds

No additional workarounds are necessary once the update to version 1.30.0 is applied.

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:
* Email us at [security@streamlit.io](mailto:security@streamlit.io)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8qw9-gf7w-42x5", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-01-12T17:35:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qw9-gf7w-42x5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8qw9-gf7w-42x5"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2024-01-12T17:35:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/streamlit/streamlit/security/advisories/GHSA-8qw9-gf7w-42x5", "https://github.com/streamlit/streamlit/commit/bd0a8996c4c7ec55b9c6557e7b168b0c13a25b90", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v4hr-4jpx-56gc", "https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2022-35918", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qw9-gf7w-42x5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/streamlit/streamlit/security-advisories/GHSA-8qw9-gf7w-42x5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/streamlit/streamlit", "summary": "Minor fix to previous patch for CVE-2022-35918", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T21:41:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qw9-gf7w-42x5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.30.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "streamlit"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.63.0, < 1.30.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Minor fix to previous patch for CVE-2022-35918
